name: Hollandaise Snack Mix
recipeIngredient: 2 package (0.9 ounces each) - hollandaise sauce mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300 degrees.
2. In a small saucepan, melt butter over medium heat.
3. Stir in the next three ingredients (Worcestershire sauce, garlic powder, and half of the hollandaise sauce mix).
4. In a large bowl, mix together peanuts, crackers, and pretzels.
5. Pour the butter mixture over the peanut mixture and toss until well coated.
6. Spread evenly on a baking sheet.
7. Bake for 15 to 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
8. Transfer to paper towels to cool completely.
9. Store in an airtight container. Yield: about 6 cups snack mix
